TestCase.name: testAliasedMetadataColumnFilter
TestCase.Resource: SELECT id FROM T3 WHERE event_ts > TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01 00:00:00'

LogicalProject(id=[$0]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[>($1, 2024-01-01 00:00:00)]) +- LogicalProject(id=[$0], event_ts=[$1]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T3, metadata=[timestamp]]])

LogicalProject(id=[$0]) +- LogicalProject(id=[$0], event_ts=[$1]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T3, metadata=[timestamp], metadataFilter=[>(timestamp, 2024-01-01 00:00:00)]]])

TestCase.name: testMetadataFilterNotPushedWhenNotSupported
TestCase.Resource: SELECT id FROM T2 WHERE event_time > TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01 00:00:00'

LogicalProject(id=[$0]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[>($2, 2024-01-01 00:00:00)]) +- LogicalProject(id=[$0], name=[$1], event_time=[$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T2, metadata=[event_time]]])

LogicalProject(id=[$0]) +- LogicalProject(id=[$0], name=[$1], event_time=[$2]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[>($2, 2024-01-01 00:00:00)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T2, metadata=[event_time]]])

TestCase.name: testMetadataFilterPushDown
TestCase.Resource: SELECT id FROM T1 WHERE event_time > TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01 00:00:00'

LogicalProject(id=[$0]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[>($2, 2024-01-01 00:00:00)]) +- LogicalProject(id=[$0], name=[$1], event_time=[$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T1, metadata=[event_time]]])

LogicalProject(id=[$0]) +- LogicalProject(id=[$0], name=[$1], event_time=[$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T1, metadata=[event_time], metadataFilter=[>(event_time, 2024-01-01 00:00:00)]]])

TestCase.name: testMetadataFilterWithProjection
TestCase.Resource: SELECT id, name FROM T5 WHERE event_time > TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01 00:00:00'

LogicalProject(id=[$0], name=[$1]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[>($2, 2024-01-01 00:00:00)]) +- LogicalProject(id=[$0], name=[$1], event_time=[$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T5, metadata=[event_time]]])

LogicalProject(id=[$0], name=[$1]) +- LogicalProject(id=[$0], name=[$1], event_time=[$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T5, metadata=[event_time], metadataFilter=[>(event_time, 2024-01-01 00:00:00)]]])

TestCase.name: testMixedPhysicalAndMetadataFilters
TestCase.Resource: SELECT id FROM T4 WHERE id > 10 AND event_time > TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01 00:00:00'

LogicalProject(id=[$0]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[AND(>($0, 10), >($2, 2024-01-01 00:00:00))]) +- LogicalProject(id=[$0], name=[$1], event_time=[$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T4, metadata=[event_time]]])

LogicalProject(id=[$0]) +- LogicalProject(id=[$0], name=[$1], event_time=[$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T4, metadata=[event_time], filter=[>(id, 10)], metadataFilter=[>(event_time, 2024-01-01 00:00:00)]]])

TestCase.name: testPartialMetadataFilterAcceptance
TestCase.Resource: SELECT id FROM T6 WHERE event_time > TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01 00:00:00' AND priority > 5

LogicalProject(id=[$0]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[AND(>($1, 2024-01-01 00:00:00), >($2, 5))]) +- LogicalProject(id=[$0], event_time=[$2], priority=[$1]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T6, metadata=[priority, event_time]]])

LogicalProject(id=[$0]) +- LogicalProject(id=[$0], event_time=[$2], priority=[$1]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[>($1, 5)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T6, metadata=[priority, event_time], metadataFilter=[>(event_time, 2024-01-01 00:00:00)]]])

TestCase.name: testPhysicalAndMetadataNameCollision
TestCase.Resource: SELECT id FROM T7 WHERE msg_offset > 5

LogicalProject(id=[$0]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[>($2, 5)]) +- LogicalProject(id=[$0], offset=[$1], msg_offset=[$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T7, metadata=[offset]]])
LogicalProject(id=[$0]) +- LogicalProject(id=[$0], offset=[$1], msg_offset=[$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T7, metadata=[offset], metadataFilter=[>(offset, 5)]]])
